# Data

This folder contains all data used by the pipeline. It is divided into two subfolders: `raw/` for input data and `processed/` for all outputs generated by the preprocessing pipeline.

---

## Important Notes

**This folder is not pushed to the repository.** Only the folder structure is versioned via `.gitkeep` files. Data files must be added manually or generated by running the pipeline scripts.

**The original raw dataset is private and large.** The full `.h5` climate and fire target files live on a remote server and cannot be redistributed. Access is restricted to authorized collaborators. Contact the repository owner for access details.

**The cleaned processed data** (`zone_sequence_merged.csv`) is a derived CSV that can be provided to reviewers upon request for review purposes. For broader access, permission from the data owner is required.

---

## Folder Structure

    1_data/
    ├── raw/
    │   └── WarningAreas/          ← Add manually before running the pipeline
    │       ├── WarningAreas.shp
    │       ├── WarningAreas.dbf
    │       ├── WarningAreas.shx
    │       └── WarningAreas.prj
    └── processed/
        ├── cell_zones.parquet         ← produced by 01_warning_areas_analysis.ipynb
        ├── zone_sequence_merged.csv   ← produced by 06_merge_yearly_data.ipynb
        ├── yearly/                    ← produced by 05_build_yearly_dataset.ipynb
        │   ├── 2008.csv
        │   └── ... (one CSV per year)
        ├── spatial_grids/             ← produced by 10_compute_spatial_grids.py
        │   ├── fire_counts_{year}.npy
        │   ├── fire_counts_total.npy
        │   ├── temperature_avg_{year}.npy
        │   └── temperature_mean_2008_2018.npy
        └── burned_area/               ← produced by 12_burned_area_analysis.ipynb
            ├── fire_counts_per_cell_all_years.parquet
            └── table2_burned_area_per_zone.csv

---

## What to Add Manually

Before running any pipeline scripts add the following to `raw/`:

- `WarningAreas/` — the Calabria warning zone shapefile and all associated files (`.shp`, `.dbf`, `.shx`, `.prj`)

This is required by scripts `01`, `02`, `03`, `11` and `12` in `2_data_preprocessing_and_analysis/`.

---

## What Gets Generated

All files in `processed/` are generated automatically by running the pipeline scripts in `2_data_preprocessing_and_analysis/` in order. See the README in that folder for the full execution guide.

The original `.h5` climate and fire target files that feed the pipeline live on a remote server at `../../Calabria_dataset/InputReteGood/`. Scripts that require this dataset are marked with 🖥️ in the preprocessing README and must be run on the remote server after cloning the repo there.
